zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Helena Egerton於大約1326年出生在英國爾艾格頓時，她的父親Philip Egerton31歲，母親Ellen St. Pierre11324歲。她於1349年與William Brereton在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1352年在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾克里夫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Helena Egerton于大约1326年出生在英国爾艾格頓时，她的父亲Philip Egerton31岁，母亲Ellen St. Pierre11324岁。她于1349年与William Brereton在英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1352年在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾克里夫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Helena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Helena Egerton was born about 1326, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, her father, Philip Egerton, was 31 and her mother, Ellen St. Pierre, was 11324. She married William Brereton in 1349, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1352, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, at the age of 27, and was buried in Clifton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Helena Egerton est née environ 1326, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Egerton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Ellen St. Pierre, avait 11324 ans. Elle a épousé William Brereton en 1349, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1352, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Clifton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1349 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1352 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England und wurde in Clifton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellen Helena Egertonが約1326年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父Philip Egertonは31歳，母Ellen St. Pierreは11324歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでWilliam Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1352年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックで27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクリフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅
ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Helena Egerton(이)가 대략 1326년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip Egerton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen St. Pierre(은)는 11324세였다. 그녀는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 William Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1352년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 클리프턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William Brereton em 1349, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Helena Egerton родилась около 1326 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Philip Egerton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Ellen St. Pierre, 11324. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brereton в 1349 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1352 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности клифтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
